'''''The Queen's Amulet''''' is a young reader book released in [[September]] [[1999]] by [[Chronicle Books]]. It was written by [[Julianne Balmain]] and illustrated by [[Matilda Harrison]]. The book came with a plastic amulet.<ref name="Chronicle" />

==Publisher's summary==
''The planet of Naboo is surrounded by dark and powerful forces, and it is up to the young, strong, and beautiful Queen Amidala to save it. Readers will thrill to this epic tale of adventure set in the faraway, long-ago galaxy of Star Wars: Episode I. Colorfully illuminated with detailed illustrations and featuring a replica of Amidala's treasured amulet, this keepsake jewelry box, hardcover book, and necklace is a fun gift for ''Star Wars fans of all ages.''<ref name="Chronicle" />

==Plot summary==
On the morning of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] discovered that an [[Padmé Amidala's amulet|important amulet]], a gift from her [[Ruwee Naberrie/Legends|father]], is missing. With the help of [[Sabé/Legends|Sabé]], the amulet is recovered in a nearby meadow. Sabé and Amidala then switch places, with Sabé wearing the amulet to complete the decoy.
